calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 13, 2015 in Department 525:
Zev Hardman, Esq. Esq. (#289375), specially appearance, for Appellant/Defendant Rob Lodes who is also present.
Alexander Lemieux, Esq. appears for Appellant/Defendant Christopher Darancette, not present, witness Erika Dumaine. The Clerk administers the witness oath to Erika Dunaine.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Rob Lodes testifies on his own behalf with the redirection of his counsel Zev Hardman. The following documentary evidence are introduced: exhibits not marked by the Court- itemized list of unpay bills, e-mails, bill log of phone call, confirmed e-mail of utility bill from appellant.

Counsel Lemieux testifies on behalf of Christopher Darancette and cross-examines Mr. Lodes. The following documentary evidence are introduced: exhibits not marked by the Court - e-mail.
Ms. Dumaine testifies on behalf of Christopher Darancette.

All parties respond to questions from Judge Yang.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge David Yang; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Judgment Entered
